productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Blue & Red Flip Flops
description: Style Note Hit the beach with this colourful pair of flip flops from adidas. Created for the carefree and offering exemplary comfort and style, these slip-on makes for perfect casual wear. Product Details Red and blue flip flops with foam thong straps with the Adidas patented 3-Stripes logo, fabric toe separator, PU footbed with print, TPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for maximum traction Material and Care PU, TPR Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust
